April 20072B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
rghisThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:49:40 UTC.12/07/2018

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Pi Alpha Xi records
Pi Alpha Xi
4379
4.8 cubic feet. 4.8 cubic feet.
1930-2015. Correspondence, certificates, photographs, leaflets, newsleters. Records of the national organization. Includes flower judging contest records and photographs, 1978-1986, and copies of Lotus Leaflets (newsletter). Collection material in English 2088106
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
4/26/2007
EAD encoding:
Julia Parker, 4/26/2007
Date Modified:
Jude Corina, June 2017
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Ornamental horticulture honorary association.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of the national organization. Includes flower judging contest records and photographs, 1978-1986, and copies of Lotus Leaflets (newsletter).
Cite As:
Pi Alpha Xi records, #4379. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Ornamental horticulture -- Societies, etc.
